overall.description: A surreal aerial view of a circular highway interchange at night, featuring two giant bioluminescent koi fish (one orange, one blue) swimming in a circular pattern around the center. The scene blends realistic urban infrastructure with fantastical elements, rendered in high-quality CGI with neon lighting effects.

segments.scene_description: A continuous aerial shot of a circular highway interchange at night, illuminated by street lights. Two giant bioluminescent koi fish, one orange and one blue, swim in a synchronized circular pattern around the center of the interchange. The camera maintains a steady top-down perspective, slowly rotating to follow the movement of the ethereal fish as they glide through the air above the urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement over a nocturnal urban landscape that blends rigid infrastructure with ethereal, bioluminescent life. It begins with a steady top-down perspective of a circular highway interchange, where the cold glow of street lights illuminates the asphalt below. As the camera slowly rotates, the focus shifts to two giant koi fish, one orange and one blue, gliding in a synchronized circular pattern through the air. The scene then expands its sense of scale as the camera maintains its orbit, following the fluid, glowing trajectories of the fish as they weave above the geometric lines of the city.
